User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Keep admin and debug pages out of search results
Disallow: /admin.html
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /debug.html

# Do NOT block /js/ or *.js — this site renders via JavaScript,
# so blocking scripts would stop Google from seeing any content.

# Auto-generated news sitemap (updated by GitHub Action)
Sitemap: https://khabardarjeeling.space/news-sitemap.xml

# Static sitemap for core pages
Sitemap: https://khabardarjeeling.space/sitemap.xml
